headline: Seagate Is Sold Out Through 2027 As AI Reshapes Hard Drive Demand
summary: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) is sold out. Management confirmed that nearline capacity is almost fully allocated through calendar 2027, a level of forward visibility that is rare for a hardware company. AI infrastructure buildout has consumed supply faster than the industry can respond, and Seagate's Mozaic HAMR (Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording) technology is the primary reason hyperscalers are locking in multi-year contracts. That demand lock-in is now flowing directly into financials: Q4 2026 (June f
